findings.title: Vulnerable dependencies (tar, minimatch, etc.)
findings.description: Multiple high-severity vulnerabilities in npm dependencies including node-tar race condition and minimatch ReDoS
findings.root_cause: Outdated dependencies with known security vulnerabilities
findings.fix: Updated compression-webpack-plugin, eslint, and replaced rollup-plugin-terser

findings.title: Hardcoded development secret fallback
findings.description: Authentication configuration uses hardcoded fallback secret 'development-only-secret' which could be exploited if development code is deployed to production
findings.fix: Removed hardcoded fallback, added proper validation and warnings

findings.title: XSS via dangerouslySetInnerHTML in highlightedTitle
findings.description: User-generated content in highlightedTitle and highlightedDescription is rendered without sanitization, allowing potential XSS attacks
findings.root_cause: Direct rendering of highlighted search results without sanitization
findings.fix: Added sanitizeHtml utility to strip dangerous HTML while preserving formatting

findings.title: XSS via dangerouslySetInnerHTML in publisher field
findings.description: Publisher data is rendered without sanitization, allowing potential XSS if malicious publisher data is imported
findings.root_cause: Trusted external data source without validation
findings.fix: Applied sanitizeHtml with anchor tag support and URL validation

findings.title: Command injection risk in Python script execution
findings.description: The PythonRunner constructs shell commands with user input without proper escaping, potentially allowing command injection
findings.root_cause: Direct string interpolation in shell command construction
findings.fix: Added escapeShellArg method and input validation

findings.title: Missing input validation in config API
findings.description: The config API endpoint uses req.query.key directly without validation, potentially allowing directory traversal or injection attacks
findings.root_cause: Missing input validation layer in API route
findings.fix: Added validateConfigKey utility with comprehensive validation

findings.title: Memory leak in useDataCache hook
findings.description: The useDataCache hook does not clean up memory cache entries when components unmount, potentially causing memory bloat in SPA navigation
findings.fix: Added useEffect cleanup and active key tracking

findings.title: Console.error in production code
findings.description: Using console.error instead of structured logging in authentication error handling
findings.root_cause: Development convenience not replaced with proper logging

findings.title: TODO/FIXME items (50+ occurrences)
findings.description: Multiple code locations contain TODO and FIXME comments indicating incomplete implementations or known issues
findings.recommendation: Review and address during regular maintenance cycles

immediate: Deploy dependency updates to all environments
short_term: Add pre-commit hooks for security scanning
Implement input validation on all API routes
long_term: Integrate Snyk or Dependabot for continuous monitoring
Add schema validation (Zod) for all API inputs
